steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence has two independent clauses: the first states that light intensity affects photosynthesis rate; the second explains how. The blank must connect them with punctuation that signals explanation.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — photosynthesis:: A colon after a complete independent clause correctly introduces an explanatory clause. ✓
  • Choice B — photosynthesis,: A comma alone between two independent clauses is a comma splice. ✗
  • Choice C — photosynthesis: Two independent clauses with no connector is a run-on. ✗
  • Choice D — photosynthesis and: "And" without a preceding comma is still a run-on, and it implies addition rather than explanation. ✗
A is correct.
